Linkies!

 Welcome to my link collection! I've collected a couple hundred neat links in my time on the internet, and here they're listed in a few categories. Organization is inconsistent, so try opening a relevant category and then using Ctrl+F.
 i'll put a ⭐ star on things i think are really cool

Other Collections: Cryptidize | Sadgrl | Peelopaalu | TheSimpleSite | Nickolox | Small Web (isaacfish) | Bytemoth
